### 1. Resumen del Lead y del Contexto

(Puntuación: 7)



- Nombre del lead: Franco

- País: No mencionado

- Perfil principal:

  ☑️ Trader rentable sin consistencia

- Capital estimado (actual):

  ☑️ 10k–50k

- Experiencia previa en mercados: Comenzó en 2024 con scalping, integración de análisis fundamental.

- Producto por el que llega:

  No definido / exploratorio

- Objetivo principal declarado: Transición a una carrera de trading/advisory para mejorar calidad de vida.

- Horizonte temporal: No mencionado

- Nivel de decisión:

  ☑️ Decide solo



Análisis:

El perfil de Franco es claro, con cierta inconsistencia en sus inversiones actuales a pesar de haber logrado rentabilidades significativas. Su objetivo principal está alineado con la oferta de Ruarte Reports, mostrando un potencial encaje.



Sugerencias de mejora:

Obtener claridad sobre el horizonte temporal de sus objetivos y determinar si hay otros decisores involucrados podría fortalecer la evaluación del encaje.



────────────────────────────



### 2. Conexión, Autoridad y Marco de la Llamada

(Puntuación: 8)



Análisis:

La llamada parece haber sido bien estructurada y se transmitió autoridad al explicar el proceso, el programa y las capacidades del equipo Ruarte. La naturalización del 'no encaje' fue adecuada.



Sugerencias de mejora:

Aumentar la claridad en la apertura sobre el posible cierre negativo para establecer expectativas claras desde el inicio.



────────────────────────────



### 3. Discovery – Descubrimiento Profundo

(Puntuación: 9)



Análisis:

Se exploraron adecuadamente los problemas actuales de Franco, incluyendo su falta de estrategia formal y desafíos en el manejo de riesgos. Sus limitaciones de tiempo y los métodos anteriores intentados fueron comprendidos.



Sugerencias de mejora:

Explorar con más profundidad los aspectos emocionales detrás de las decisiones de Franco podría proporcionar insights valiosos adicionales.



────────────────────────────



### 4. Recapitulación Estratégica y Transición

(Puntuación: 9)



Análisis:

La recapitulación de los problemas de Franco fue clara, así como la explicación de los riesgos de no actuar. El proceso de transición hacia la propuesta fue fluido.



Sugerencias de mejora:

Asegurarse de confirmar explícitamente que Franco siente que su situación fue bien entendida podría fortalecer el sentido de validación.



────────────────────────────



### 5. Presentación del Programa Ruarte Reports

(Puntuación: 9)



Análisis:

La presentación del programa fue profesional, explicando el valor de la estructura, el análisis experto y el soporte comunitario. Se ajustó claramente a los dolores identificados y se presentó el precio sin culpa.



Sugerencias de mejora:

Garantizar que se simplifique la explicación sin perder la complejidad y el valor inherente podría mejorar la percepción del valor.



────────────────────────────



### 6. Objeciones, Decisión y Cierre

(Puntuación: 8)



Resultado de la decisión:

☑️ Sí



Análisis:

El manejo de objeciones fue competente, y el proceso de decisión fue presentado de forma natural sin presiones innecesarias.



Sugerencias de mejora:

Revisar si existieron objeciones no verbales o implícitas y abordar estas de manera proactiva en futuras llamadas.



────────────────────────────



### Nota Global de la Llamada



- Puntuación final (1–10): 8.3

- Calidad del lead:

  ☑️ Media



Conclusión general:

El closer realizó un buen trabajo balanceando autoridad y conexión, logrando que Franco se comprometa con el programa. Sin embargo, una comprensión más profunda de las componentes emocionales y el potencial decisor múltiple podría pulir futuras interacciones. El lead tiene un encaje razonable con Ruarte Reports, pero mejorar la claridad sobre su horizonte temporal y los pasos futuros posibles fortalecerá la relación continua.

Análisis:

El perfil de Tiago es claro y se ajusta bien con el ecosistema Ruarte Reports. Se identifica un problema real y un objetivo claro. Sin embargo, falta información sobre el país y el horizonte temporal.

2. Conexión, Autoridad y Marco de la Llamada  

(Puntuación: 9)



Objetivo del bloque:



Puntos a evaluar:

- Apertura humana pero profesional

- Capacidad de marcar estructura desde el inicio

- Transferencia de autoridad (Ruarte, método, trayectoria)

- Control del marco de la conversación

- Claridad sobre el “sí o no” final



Análisis:

Se estableció un marco claro y profesional desde el inicio. La autoridad de Ruarte fue correctamente transferida y el proceso de la llamada fue explicado adecuadamente. El lead aceptó el marco y reconoció la autoridad.



Sugerencias de mejora:

- Asegurarse de normativizar el “no encaje” desde el inicio para gestionar expectativas.



────────────────────────────



3. Discovery – Descubrimiento Profundo  

(Puntuación: 7)



Objetivo del bloque:



Información crítica a detectar:

- Evento detonante de la llamada: Estrategia “improvisacional” y estrés psicológico por pérdidas.

- Dolor principal: Estrés psicológico y pérdidas.

- Dolor secundario: Ejecución inconsistente de beneficios.

- Impacto del problema: No hay detalle específico sobre capital, decisiones y tranquilidad mental.

- Qué intentó antes: Estrategia reactiva basada en consejos genéricos.

- Sesgos, errores o falta de estructura: Falta de marco claro para detectar cambios de tendencia.

- Urgencia real: No mencionada



Puntos a evaluar:

- Profundidad de las preguntas

- Capacidad de escucha

- Ausencia de enseñanza o aporte de valor prematuro

- Uso de silencio y repregunta



Análisis:

El descubrimiento fue adecuado, pero faltó mayor exploración de los impactos específicos en áreas como el capital y la tranquilidad mental. La urgencia no fue identificada claramente.



Sugerencias de mejora:

- Profundizar en el impacto emocional y financiero del problema.

- Clarificar la urgencia y razones íntimas para el cambio inmediato.



────────────────────────────



4. Recapitulación Estratégica y Transición  

(Puntuación: 8)



Objetivo del bloque:



Puntos clave:

- Recapitulación clara del contexto

- Identificación del bloqueo principal

- Riesgo real de no actuar

- Objetivo real del lead

- Confirmación explícita del lead

- Transición natural hacia la propuesta



Análisis:

El lead se sintió comprendido y se validó la recapitulación. Hubo una transición adecuada hacia la propuesta, aunque el riesgo de no actuar no fue tan explotado.



Sugerencias de mejora:

- Enfocar más en los riesgos de mantener la situación actual sin intervenir.



────────────────────────────



5. Presentación del Programa Ruarte Reports  

(Puntuación: 9)



Objetivo del bloque:



Puntos a evaluar:

- Claridad del resultado final

- Presentación del precio

- Dominio del programa

- Ajuste al dolor detectado



Análisis:

El programa se presentó como un vehículo lógico y profesional, ajustándose al dolor identificado. El precio fue presentado sin justificación excesiva.



Sugerencias de mejora:

- Reforzar la diferenciación del programa frente a otros métodos menos serios en el mercado.



────────────────────────────



6. Objeciones, Decisión y Cierre  

(Puntuación: 8)



Objetivo del bloque:



Puntos a evaluar:

- Apertura post-presentación

- Manejo de objeciones

- Uso correcto del motivo inicial

- Claridad en opciones y próximos pasos



Resultado de la decisión:

☑ Sí



Análisis:

La decisión fue una consecuencia natural del proceso. El manejo de objeciones fue correcto, y los pasos siguientes fueron claros.



Sugerencias de mejora:

- Asegurarse de clarificar cualquier potencial incertidumbre restante antes del cierre definitivo.



────────────────────────────



Nota Global de la Llamada



- Puntuación final (1–10): 8.2

- Calidad del lead:

  ☑ Alta



Conclusión general:

El desempeño del closer fue profesional y adecuado, logrando un buen encaje del lead con Ruarte Reports. Sin embargo, se puede mejorar en la exploración de impactos y urgencias.

**1. Resumen del Lead y del Contexto**  

(Puntuación: 4/10)



- Nombre del lead: Alex

- País: No mencionado

- Perfil principal: 

  ☐ Trader principiante

- Capital estimado (actual):

  ☐ <10k

- Experiencia previa en mercados: 1 mes de trading en demo autodidacta

- Producto por el que llega: No definido / exploratorio

- Objetivo principal declarado: Construir una carrera rentable en trading en dos años

- Horizonte temporal: Dos años

- Nivel de decisión:

  ☐ Decide solo



Análisis:  

El perfil de Alex es claro como estudiante de secundaria con experiencia mínima y capital limitado. Carece del capital y experiencia que típicamente encajan con Ruarte Reports, planteando dudas sobre su alineación con el ecosistema. Su motivación está bien definida, pero su situación financiera lo limita.



Sugerencias de mejora:  

Explorar vías alternativas o escalables que puedan ser más accesibles para un estudiante sin capital suficiente. Traer claridad sobre el país podría ayudar a entender mejor el contexto cultural y económico.



────────────────────────────



**2. Conexión, Autoridad y Marco de la Llamada**  

(Puntuación: 5/10)



Objetivo del bloque: Establecer un marco de auditoría y no de venta, transmitiendo autoridad tranquila y liderazgo.



Análisis:  

La apertura fue adecuada, pero faltó una clara estructura inicial que estableciera el marco de Ruarte Reports y normalizara la posibilidad del "no encaje". Hubo esfuerzo para transmitir autoridad, pero la presentación final se inclinó hacia la venta en lugar de una auditoría.



Sugerencias de mejora:  

Fortalecer el marco inicial de la llamada, explicando claramente el proceso y estableciendo la autoridad de Ruarte Reports desde el inicio. Mejorar la percepción de la llamada como una auditoría y no como una venta.



────────────────────────────



**3. Discovery – Descubrimiento Profundo**  

(Puntuación: 6/10)



Objetivo del bloque: Entender qué le pasa hoy al lead, por qué es un problema real y por qué no lo puede resolver solo.



Análisis:  

Se logró identificar el evento detonante y el dolor principal, aunque faltó profundizar en aspectos como qué intentó antes y por qué no resultó. No se detectaron sesgos o errores específicos y faltó entender mejor la urgencia real más allá del deseo de ayudar a su familia.



Sugerencias de mejora:  

Realizar preguntas más profundas sobre sus intentos previos y explorar sus percepciones sobre lo que lo limita provocaría un entendimiento más claro. Identificar sus expectativas y cómo plantea manejar los desafíos financieros también sería valioso.



────────────────────────────



**4. Recapitulación Estratégica y Transición**  

(Puntuación: 5/10)



Objetivo del bloque: Demostrar comprensión total del caso y pedir permiso para avanzar.



Análisis:  

La recapitulación fue un poco débil, sin una identificación clara de errores o bloqueos principales y los riesgos de no actuar. La transición hacia la propuesta fue relativamente directa, pero no se validó suficientemente la recapitulación por parte del lead.



Sugerencias de mejora:  

Reforzar la recapitulación asegurando que el lead valide y comprenda los puntos cruciales discutidos. Identificar y enfatizar los riesgos reales de no actuar podría crear un puente más sólido hacia la propuesta.



────────────────────────────



**5. Presentación del Programa Ruarte Reports**  

(Puntuación: 6/10)



Objetivo del bloque: Presentar el programa como vehículo lógico, profesional y exclusivo, no como un curso.



Análisis:  

La presentación del programa fue clara en términos de estructura, pero carecía de ajuste específico al dolor detectado. El precio se presentó sin suficiente exploración de cómo se alinea con la situación financiera del lead.



Sugerencias de mejora:  

Simplificar la presentación centrándose en los beneficios relevantes para el lead, considerando su situación financiera. Asegurarse de que el programa realmente parezca el vehículo lógico frente al problema planteado.



────────────────────────────



**6. Objeciones, Decisión y Cierre**  

(Puntuación: 5/10)



Objetivo del bloque: Acompañar la decisión de manera profesional, volviendo al problema inicial sin presión.



Análisis:  

Hubo intentos de manejar objeciones financieramente, pero la estructura alternativa fue más una solución forzada que una opción lógica y natural. La decisión parecía más empujada por flexibilidad en términos de pago que como consecuencia natural del proceso.



Sugerencias de mejora:  

Trabajar en abrir el espacio post-presentación para explorar genuinamente las objeciones y tener una conversación más abierta sobre soluciones. Aclarar las opciones y próximos pasos sin comprometer la integridad profesional de la propuesta.



────────────────────────────



**Nota Global de la Llamada**



- Puntuación final (1–10): 5

- Calidad del lead:

  ☐ Baja



Conclusión general:  

La llamada mostró esfuerzo y elementos bien manejados, pero en general faltó cla

**2. Conexión, Autoridad y Marco de la Llamada**  

(Puntuación: 7)



Análisis:

La llamada se presentó como una auditoría profesional y no como una venta directa, lo cual está alineado con la metodología de Ruarte Reports. La autoridad de la firma fue adecuadamente transmitida, y el proceso fue explicado.

(Puntuación: 8)

Sugerencias de mejora:

Sugerencias de mejora:

- Enfatizar las consecuencias a largo plazo de no abordar los problemas de trading actuales.

- Obtener una confirmación verbal del lead después de cada recapitulación.

**5. Presentación del Programa Ruarte Reports**  

(Puntuación: 5)



Análisis:

El programa fue presentado como una solución lógica al problema identificado. Sin embargo, la capacidad del lead para financiar el programa fue un obstáculo significativo.



Sugerencias de mejora:

- Enfocar más en el valor incremental del programa en cuanto al desarrollo profesional y personal, más allá del costo inmediato.

- Explorar opciones de pago más accesibles o planes de financiamiento.

**6. Objeciones, Decisión y Cierre**  

(Puntuación: 6)



Análisis:

El liderazgo en el manejo de objeciones fue competente, pero no condujo a una resolución clara. La objeción principal del costo no fue resuelta.



Sugerencias de mejora:

- Reforzar la conexión entre la inversión en el programa y los objetivos futuros del lead.

- Identificar formas en que el lead puede reorganizar sus prioridades para poder participar.

- Puntuación final (1–10): 6.5

El desempeño del closer fue sólido en establecer el marco y explorar profundamente el problema del lead. Sin embargo, las limitaciones financieras actuales del lead hacen que el encaje con Ruarte Reports sea desafiante. Se debe considerar cómo ofrecer un camino accesible para que el lead pueda beneficiarse del programa mientras administra sus restricciones de capital.

### 1. Resumen del Lead y del Contexto  

**Puntuación: 7**



- Nombre del lead: Nicolás

- País: No mencionado

- Perfil principal:

  ☐ Trader principiante ☒ Inversor con capital ☐ Empresario / Profesional ☐ Otro

- Capital estimado (actual):

  ☒ <10k ☐ 10k–50k ☐ 50k–100k ☐ +100k

- Experiencia previa en mercados: Primera vez en mercados financieros; experiencia previa con plazos fijos de bajo rendimiento en Argentina.

- Producto por el que llega: No definido / exploratorio

- Objetivo principal declarado: Crecer capital, aprender el proceso y evitar erosión por inflación.

- Horizonte temporal: Corto plazo (e.g., 2 años).

- Nivel de decisión:

  ☒ Decide solo ☐ Consulta con terceros



**Análisis:**

El perfil de Nicolás está relativamente claro, siendo un inversor novato con poco capital pero interesado en expandir su conocimiento y capital. Su falta de experiencia en mercados financieros es notable y define sus necesidades. No hay indicativos explícitos de preferencia por un producto específico, aunque se le presentaron dos opciones.



**Sugerencias de mejora:**

1. Profundizar en el entendimiento de sus expectativas y temores específicos aparte de la erosión inflacionaria.

2. Confirmar su ubicación geográfica para mejores propuestas contextuales.

3. Clarificar su preferencia inicial hacia un producto.



────────────────────────────



### 2. Conexión, Autoridad y Marco de la Llamada  

**Puntuación: 6**



**Objetivo del bloque:**

Establecer un marco de auditoría y criterio, no de venta, transmitiendo autoridad tranquila y liderazgo.



**Análisis:**

La llamada parece haberse llevado con profesionalismo, pero hay ciertas áreas confusas respecto a la estructura del proceso de la llamada. El lead tiene aún que decidir y estaba en proceso de revisión de materiales, indicando tal vez que el marco no fue tan claro al inicial.



**Sugerencias de mejora:**

1. Asegurar una presentación inicial que enfatice que la llamada es una auditoría, no una simple venta.

2. Hacer claro desde el inicio cuál es el criterio de decisión para evitar ambigüedades.

3. Usar un lenguaje que resalte más la autoridad de Ruarte Reports y su metodología.



────────────────────────────



### 3. Discovery – Descubrimiento Profundo  

**Puntuación: 5**



**Objetivo del bloque:**

Entender qué le pasa hoy al lead, por qué es un problema real y por qué no lo puede resolver solo.



**Análisis:**

Se identificaron algunos puntos clave, como su objetivo y preocupación por la inflación. Sin embargo, no hay suficiente información sobre los eventos concretos que llevaron a la llamada o por qué se siente incapaz de resolver estos problemas por su cuenta.



**Sugerencias de mejora:**

1. Investigar eventos específicos que motivaron a Nicolás a hacer la llamada.

2. Profundizar en sus sentimientos sobre la capacidad para gestionar inversiones por sí mismo.

3. Utilizar preguntas más profundas para comprender los sesgos o errores previos.



────────────────────────────



### 4. Recapitulación Estratégica y Transición  

**Puntuación: 6**



**Objetivo del bloque:**

Demostrar comprensión total del caso y pedir permiso para avanzar.



**Análisis:**

La recapitulación parece haber quedado incompleta, ya que Nicolás todavía necesita revisar materiales para tomar una decisión. Se debe hacer más claro el riesgo de no actuar y el error principal a corregir.



**Sugerencias de mejora:**

1. Hacer una recapitulación que demuestre un entendimiento total.

2. Plantear claramente los riesgos y beneficios de acción versus inacción.

3. Confirmar verbalmente con Nicolás sus principales objetivos antes de cerrar este bloque.



────────────────────────────



### 5. Presentación del Programa Ruarte Reports

────────────────────────────



5. Presentación del Programa Ruarte Reports  

(Puntuación: 7/10)



Análisis:

La presentación del programa fue clara y se alineó con ciertos dolores. Sin embargo, faltó enfatizar cómo específicamente resuelve sus bloqueos psicológicos y retos de tiempo.



Sugerencias de mejora:

Personalizar más la presentación del programa a sus problemas específicos. Resaltar cómo la estructura del programa superará sus actuales limitaciones de "psychotrading".



────────────────────────────



6. Objeciones, Decisión y Cierre  

(Puntuación: 6/10)



Análisis:

La decisión de posponer fue una consecuencia natural del proceso. Sin embargo, las objeciones del lead sobre el momento adecuado para empezar no fueron completamente desafiadas.



Sugerencias de mejora:

Explorar más a fondo las razones detrás de su decisión para posponer y asegurar claridad sobre los próximos pasos. Incentivar un reevaluación rápida con métricas concretas de éxito posibles.



────────────────────────────



Nota Global de la Llamada



- Puntuación final (6/10):

- Calidad del lead:

  ☐ Alta

  ☑ Media

  ☐ Baja



Conclusión general:

El closer mostró un desempeño razonable, pero pudo haber mejorado en el establecimiento del marco y la profundización de las motivaciones del lead. El lead tiene potencial, pero su encaje actual presenta retos que necesitarían de un enfoque estratégico bien definido de Ruarte Reports para ser superados.

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[Qualify Facundo Serafini for a professional trading program.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Facundo Serafini, a 3-year trader, lacks a professional framework, feeling his profitable trades are based on luck (e.g., Fibonacci) rather than a deep understanding of market mechanics.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Solution:** A 6-month mentorship program providing a structured methodology via 150+ hours of content, live classes, and direct feedback from mentors (Roberto Juno, Marco Álvaro) on a private Discord.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [**Decision:** Serafini will join the "Beca" (Scholarship) program, using his $1,000 capital to trade while gaining access to 60% of the course content. This avoids de-capitalizing for the full $1,300 fee.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [**Action:** Serafini will convert his $1,000 cash to USDT on Binance by Thursday, April 2, to finalize enrollment.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2705.0)

## Topics

### Serafini's Trading Challenge

  - [**Experience:** 3 years, starting in a multi-level marketing (MLM) scheme before focusing on professional trading.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [**Current Focus:** Intraday trading on the Nasdaq 100 index.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Core Problem:** Lacks a professional trading structure, feeling his profitable trades are based on luck.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [**Goal:** Develop a framework based on statistics and probabilities (e.g., Monte Carlo), moving beyond simple technical analysis.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [**Action:** Stopped live trading \~8 months ago to study fundamental analysis and backtest strategies, awaiting a solid methodology before re-entering the market.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Proposed Mentorship Program

  - [**Structure:** 6-month intensive program designed to build a professional trading foundation.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [**Components:**](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
      - [**Online Platform:** 150+ hours of video content (technical analysis, market cycles, Elliot Wave).](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
      - [**Onboarding:** A questionnaire to define a personalized trading plan.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
      - [**Discord Community:**](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
          - [**Direct Feedback:** Share analyses for personalized video/text feedback from mentors (Roberto Juno, Marco Álvaro).](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
          - [**Investment Ideas:** Daily macro, crypto, and commodity analyses from a 17-person team.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
          - [**Live Classes:** Weekly sessions with mentors.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build criteria and market understanding, not provide signals.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

### Enrollment & Pricing

  - [**Standard Fee:** $1,700, discounted to $1,300 for a same-day decision.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
  - [**Capital Mismatch:** Serafini's $1,000 capital is insufficient for the fee plus the recommended $1,000–$2,000 trading capital.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)
  - [**Solution → "Beca" (Scholarship) Program:**](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [**Cost:** $0 upfront.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [**Access:** 60% of the full program content.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [**Capital:** Serafini keeps his $1,000 to trade and scale.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [**Path to Full Program:** Upgrade to the full program once capital grows to $2,000–$3,000.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)
  - [**Payment Method:** USDT on Binance to avoid high bank transfer fees (8–12%).](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Facundo Serafini:** Convert $1,000 cash to USDT on Binance by Thursday, April 2.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2705.0)
  - [**Closer1 Ruarte:** Provide onboarding support and add Serafini to the Discord community upon payment.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [**Closer1 Ruarte:** Send Roberto Juno's PDF book to Serafini.](https://fathom.video/calls/621223315?tab=summary&timestamp=2654.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the initial crypto transfer to StarTrader.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Transfer Blocked:** The planned $500 USDT transfer from Binance to StarTrader was blocked by a 47-hour security hold, triggered by a recent Google Authenticator reset.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [**Onboarding Paused:** The onboarding process is on hold until the security hold expires, expected around Wednesday, April 2nd, at 7–8 PM.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [**Program Cost Clarified:** The full 6-month program costs $1,300 (discounted from $1,700), not a monthly fee, making the future transition more accessible.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Diego will re-attempt the transfer on Wednesday evening and update Ruarte.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)

## Topics

### Crypto Transfer Failure

  - [**Goal:** Transfer $500 USDT from Binance to StarTrader to activate the account.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
    1.  [Generated a USDT-BEP20 deposit address in StarTrader.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
    2.  [Copied the address to initiate a withdrawal from Binance.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Binance triggered a 47-hour security hold, preventing the transfer.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [**Reason:** A recent reset of Google Authenticator, a standard security measure.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [**Resolution:** The hold expires around Wednesday, April 2nd, at 7–8 PM.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

### Onboarding & Program Details

  - [**Onboarding Status:** Paused until the transfer is complete.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Access to the Discord community and online platform.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [**Action:** Ruarte will contact Flor to assist with Discord setup.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**Program Cost & Structure:**](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
      - [**Initial Phase:** Free scholarship to build capital and platform familiarity.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
      - [**Full Program:** $1,300 for 6 months (discounted from $1,700). Ruarte may seek a further discount.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [**Investment Strategy & Projections:**](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [**Goal:** Use initial capital ($1.5k–$2.5k) to fund the full program cost.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [**Long-Term Target:** 10x portfolio growth over 5–6 years, managed with a balanced risk profile (e.g., 40% conservative, 60% moderate/aggressive).](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [**Delegation:** Option to delegate management of a portion of the portfolio (from $5k) after gaining experience.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Diego:** Re-attempt the $500 USDT transfer to StarTrader on Wednesday evening (April 2nd, \~7–8 PM) and update Ruarte.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [**Ruarte:** Contact Flor to assist with Discord setup.](https://fathom.video/calls/621551868?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore investment coaching and managed fund services for Seba.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dual Need:** Seba wants to learn investing for a future career and delegate management of idle business cash (starting with \~$10k USD) to generate returns now.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A dual-track approach: a 6-month coaching program for learning, and a managed fund service for immediate capital growth.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [**Pricing Incentive:** Bundling both services offers a significant discount on the coaching program, reducing its cost from $1,700 to $1,000.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [**Decision Pending:** Seba will consult an accountant on capital availability and tax implications before deciding.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)

## Topics

### Seba's Investment Goals & Context

  - [**Primary Goal:** Learn investing for a future career, as a physical job (printing business) is unsustainable long-term.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Secondary Goal:** Generate returns on idle business cash from Mercado Libre sales.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Experience:** 2 years of self-taught investing, currently using Cocos Capital's suggested portfolios (e.g., EWZ, Nubank, Google).](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Frustration with slow progress and "copy-paste" investing → seeks structured guidance to accelerate learning.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [**Time Commitment:** Can dedicate \~4 hours/week to learning.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### Proposed Solutions & Pricing

  - [**1. Managed Fund Service (Delegated Investing)**](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
    
      - [**Purpose:** Grow capital immediately while Seba learns.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Funds are pooled in a master account managed by Roberto.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [**Target Return:** 30–40% annual average (last year: 25%).](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
      - [**Fees:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
          - [**Initial:** 2.5% one-time fee on capital invested.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
          - [**Performance:** 30% of profits (70/30 split).](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
      - [**Minimum:** $5,000 USD.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [**Funding:** Via crypto (USDT) to avoid high bank fees (8–10%).](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)

  - [**2. 6-Month Coaching Program (Learning)**](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
    
      - [**Purpose:** Provide structured education and support.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [**Components:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
          - [**Online Platform:** 160+ hours of content.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
          - [**Custom Strategy:** Onboarding form creates a personalized learning plan.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
          - [**Discord Community:** Direct feedback on analyses from Roberto's team.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
          - [**Market Analysis:** Daily updates from a 17-analyst team.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
      - [**Cost:** $1,700 USD.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
      - [**Discount:** $1,300 USD if purchased alone.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
      - [**Bundle Price:** $1,000 USD if purchased with the managed fund.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Seba:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
      - [Consult accountant on capital availability and tax implications.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
      - [Decide on the managed fund and/or coaching program.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
      - [Communicate decision via WhatsApp.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
  - [**Ruarte:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)
      - [Follow up with Seba at 7 PM today.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)
      - [Assist with crypto setup (Binance) if Seba proceeds.](https://fathom.video/calls/622602146?tab=summary&timestamp=2486.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[Qualify Mateo for an investment education program.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Mateo, a self-taught investor, wants to learn technical analysis (TA) to improve his entry timing, aiming for 20-40% annual returns.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Blocker:** His $2k portfolio is insufficient for the program's $1.3k fee plus the recommended $3k+ working capital, creating a financial gap.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The program is not a fit. Mateo declined a partial scholarship requiring a broker transfer, citing the cost and capital requirements.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

## Topics

### Mateo's Profile & Investment Goals

  - [**Background:** Part-time supply chain professional with 4–6 hours/week for study.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [**Experience:** Self-taught investor since late 2024, inspired by Roberto's Instagram content.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Uses fundamental analysis (podcasts, news) for "what" to buy and TA for "when" to enter.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [**Portfolio:** \~$2,000, invested internationally (US, Brazil) to avoid Argentine market volatility.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [**Performance:** \~15–20% annual return in 2024.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Future Plan:** After graduating in July, invest new savings (\~$200-300k ARS/mo) to compound capital.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

### Program Fit & Financial Blocker

  - [**Program Cost:** $1,700, discounted to $1,300 for a same-day decision.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [**Capital Requirement:** A minimum of $3,000–$5,000 is recommended to ensure profitability after the fee.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [**Financial Gap:** Mateo's $2,000 portfolio is insufficient to cover the fee and provide adequate working capital.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)

### Proposed Solution: Partial Scholarship

  - [**Offer:** A 60% program scholarship was offered to bridge the financial gap.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [**Condition:** Mateo must transfer his capital to the program's partner broker.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This provides access to community analysis and live classes, enabling him to scale his portfolio toward the $3k+ threshold for the full program.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Mateo declined, stating the program was not a fit for his current financial situation.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mateo:** Continue self-study and grow portfolio capital.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [**Closer1 Ruarte:** No further action.](https://fathom.video/calls/622763999?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[To evaluate Roberto's investment advisory service for Martin's portfolio.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Client Need:** Martin (56) must live off his $300k portfolio, targeting a consistent 20% annual return to generate a $60k income. His current returns are inconsistent (e.g., 4–5% last year).](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A 1-on-1 advisory service with Roberto for $12k/year, providing direct WhatsApp guidance and portfolio strategy.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Primary Objection:** The $12k upfront fee. Martin prefers a performance-based model to align incentives and avoid paying for uncertain results.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Status:** Martin is considering the offer but is also evaluating two other performance-fee-based services.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

## Topics

### Martin's Investment Challenge

  - [**Objective:** Generate a consistent 20% annual return from his $300k Interactive Brokers portfolio to create a $60k income.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Martin (56) is retired and must live off his investments, making consistency and risk management critical.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Performance Gap:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Goal:** Consistent 20% annual return.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Reality:** Inconsistent returns (e.g., 2024: 20%, 2023: 15–18%, 2025: 4–5%).](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**Knowledge Gap:** Martin understands basic technical analysis (support/resistance, moving averages) but struggles to detect actionable opportunities and apply complex methods like Elliott Wave theory.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

### Proposed Solution: 1-on-1 Advisory Service

  - [**Service Model:** Advisory guidance, not delegated management. Martin retains full control over his capital.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Direct Access:** 1-on-1 WhatsApp contact with Roberto for real-time guidance.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Portfolio Strategy:** Initial session to analyze Martin's profile and propose two portfolio scenarios:](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
        1.  [Restructuring of the current portfolio.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
        2.  [A new portfolio based on Roberto's market thesis (targeting 40–60% annual returns).](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
      - [**Market Intelligence:** Daily insights from a 17-analyst team covering macroeconomics, crypto, stocks, and commodities.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**Community Access:** Entry into a private circle of clients with portfolios of $200k+.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

### Pricing & Martin's Objection

  - [**Cost:** $12,000 for a one-year subscription.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Payment:** Upfront fee required to begin the service. Installments are possible.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [**Martin's Objection:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [**Principle:** A strong personal dislike for paying upfront for services with uncertain outcomes.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**Risk:** The fee is lost if performance doesn't improve.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Martin is evaluating two other advisory services that use a performance-fee model.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [**Rationale for Fee Structure:** Performance-fee models are reserved for delegated management of portfolios \>$1M.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Martin:** Evaluate the $12k upfront fee model against competing performance-fee services.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Hernán:** Follow up with Martin later today to check his decision.](https://fathom.video/calls/622669383?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[To assess Rodrigo's investment needs and present two potential solutions.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Rodrigo's portfolio is \~50% liquid (USD in Binance) due to market caution, yielding minimal returns (0–10% USD/yr) since 2018.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Goal:** Long-term growth via education (technical analysis, Elliott Waves) and/or delegated management.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Training:** 6-month program for $1,300 (discounted from $1,700).](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**Management (PAM Account):** Delegated management with a 2.5% admin fee and 30% performance fee on profits.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [**Decision:** Rodrigo will likely start with the PAM account to activate his capital before a June trip, deferring the training program until July.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)

## Topics

### Rodrigo's Investment Profile

  - [**Experience:** Investing since \~2018, primarily in Argentine assets via Balance.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Performance:** Minimal returns (0–10% USD/yr), often just beating inflation.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [**Reason:** Past errors (e.g., no stop-loss) during market corrections.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Current Portfolio:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [**\~50% Liquid:** USD in Binance, held due to caution on US/commodities markets.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
      - [**\~50% Invested:** Argentine stocks (CEDEARs), bonds, and mutual funds.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Goal:** Long-term growth (2026–2030), not short-term gains.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

### Proposed Solutions & Pricing

  - [**1. Training Program**](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Content:** 160+ hours of video covering technical analysis, supply/demand, and Elliott Waves.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Support:** 6 months of access to a Discord community for analysis feedback from Roberto and his team.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [**Cost:** $1,300 (discounted from $1,700).](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [**2. PAM Account (Delegated Management)**](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Links Rodrigo's broker account to a master account, granting the team trade-only permissions.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
      - [**Fees:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
          - [**Admin Fee:** 2.5% one-time fee on initial capital.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
          - [**Performance Fee:** 30% of profits (70% for Rodrigo).](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**Target:** 40% annual USD return (base case), with a 25% minimum and 60–80% upside potential.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)

### Rodrigo's Decision Path

  - [**Constraint:** A 3-week trip to Peru in June prevents active training.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [**Plan:** Start with the PAM account now to activate his liquid capital.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [**Deferral:** Begin the training program in July, after his trip.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [**Flexibility:** The training program can be paused for the trip, and a discount is available for bundling both services.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rodrigo:** Evaluate the proposals and communicate a decision to Hernán.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [**Hernán:** Send Rodrigo the PAM account PDF and follow up for a decision.](https://fathom.video/calls/622900104?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[Qualify a prospective trading student and present program options.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Prospect Profile:** A student/waiter (Luis) with \~$300 MXN (\~$17 USD) and \~1.5 months of self-study, seeking a structured path to trading for a secondary income.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Program Options:** Two tiers were presented:](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
      - [**Full Program:** $1,700 fee + $3k–$5k recommended trading capital.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [**Scholarship:** A 60% program version for a $500 minimum trading capital commitment (no fee).](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Luis will save for the $500 scholarship capital over 1.5–2 months. Ruarte advised against trading until then to avoid speculative losses.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

## Topics

### Prospect Profile & Goals

  - [**Background:** Student and waiter in Monterrey, MX.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Experience:** \~1.5 months of self-study; no capital invested.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [**Current Capital:** \~$300 MXN (\~$17 USD).](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Objective:** Build a reliable secondary income stream via trading.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Risk Tolerance:** Cautious; wants a structured plan, not speculative "casino" trading.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

### Program Options & Strategy

  - [**Full Program:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [**Fee:** $1,700.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [**Recommended Capital:** $3,000–$5,000.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Ensures students have capital to trade *after* paying the fee, preventing a scenario where they pay for training but have no funds to apply it.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [**Scholarship Program:**](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Access:** \~60% of the full program's content.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Requirement:** $500 minimum trading capital commitment (no fee).](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Goal:** Use the $500 to build capital (e.g., to $2k–$3k) before upgrading to the full program.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

### Immediate Recommendations

  - [**Do Not Trade:** Avoid trading the current small capital without a plan.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevents speculative losses and protects the funds needed for the scholarship.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Read "El poder de los mercados":** Ruarte sent Roberto's book to Luis via WhatsApp for preparatory reading.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Luis:** Save $500 for the scholarship program over the next 1.5–2 months.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [**Luis:** Contact Ruarte via WhatsApp upon reaching the $500 goal to check for scholarship availability.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [**Ruarte:** Follow up with Luis in \~2 months.](https://fathom.video/calls/622966455?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[To assess Lucas's investment needs and present a structured advisory program.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Self-Taught Investor:** Lucas, a graphic designer, manages a \~$5k portfolio with a self-taught, high-conviction strategy (e.g., buying Intel at $20, selling at $35).](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [**Core Problem → Confidence:** Lacking a formal system, he feels "hyper-vigilant" and misses opportunities due to uncertainty (e.g., hesitated on a Meta dip over a CDR price discrepancy).](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=2618.0)
  - [**The Offer → System & Feedback:** The program provides a structured methodology (160+ hrs content), direct feedback on personal analyses via Discord, and live sessions with experts.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
  - [**The Ask → Proof & Price:** Lucas requires verifiable proof of expert credentials and is weighing the $1,300 discounted price against his history of using free resources.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4266.0)

## Topics

### Lucas's Investment Journey & Current State

  - [**Background:** 4 years of self-taught investing, starting with crypto seminars and evolving from trading to investing with advisor Fernando.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Portfolio:** \~$5k capital, actively managed.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**Performance:** \~10-12% annual returns initially, growing to \~30% last year.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [**Current Issue:** Holding Adobe and Oracle with \~40% losses, highlighting the need for a more robust system.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=2516.0)
  - [**Methodology:**](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [**Sourcing:** Identifies assets from advisor recommendations, news, and social media.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Uses TradingView for technicals and AI (ChatGPT/Claude) for fundamental/macro research.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [**Validation:** Cross-references personal analyses with advisor recommendations for confidence.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)
      - [**Exit Strategy:** Employs "house money" (selling principal, letting profits run), but missed a larger gain on Google by selling too early.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)

### The Problem: Lack of Confidence & System

  - [**Core Issue:** Feels his process is "playing by ear," leading to "analysis paralysis" and missed opportunities.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Build a reliable system to manage larger capital (e.g., $10k+) without the current level of stress and uncertainty.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3271.0)
  - [**Specific Example (Meta):** Hesitated to buy a dip due to a CDR price discrepancy, missing a potential 10% gain. This highlights how a lack of knowledge directly impacts returns.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=2618.0)

### The Solution: A Structured Advisory Program

  - [**Program Overview:** A single, all-inclusive membership for 6 months.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4165.0)
  - [**Components:**](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
      - [**Education:** 160+ hours of asynchronous content (TA, market cycles, patterns).](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
      - [**Personalized Strategy:** Onboarding form creates a custom plan based on risk profile and goals.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3218.0)
      - [**Community & Feedback (Discord):** Direct access to experts for feedback on personal analyses.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3513.0)
      - [**Live Sessions:**](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3720.0)
          - [**Roberto:** Analyzes user-requested assets live.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3720.0)
          - [**Marco Álvarez:** Conducts live day trading sessions, explaining real-time decisions.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4046.0)
  - [**Expert Credentials:** Roberto is an advisor to prominent Argentine investors Eduardo Costantini (Consultatio) and Eduardo Elsztain (IRSA).](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4210.0)

### The Offer & Lucas's Response

  - [**Price:** $1,700 standard, discounted to $1,300 if purchased today.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4358.0)
  - [**Lucas's Response:**](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4266.0)
      - [**Interest:** High interest in the structured system and expert feedback.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=3271.0)
      - [**Skepticism:** Requires verifiable proof of expert credentials to overcome his general distrust of online programs.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4266.0)
      - [**Financial Caution:** Must weigh the $1,300 cost against his history of using free resources.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4358.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hernán:** Send Lucas a PDF with program details, pricing, and the Hipotecario fund performance data.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4388.0)
  - [**Hernán:** Follow up in 2-3 hours to confirm Lucas's decision.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4410.0)
  - [**Lucas:** Review materials and decide whether to proceed.](https://fathom.video/calls/623012944?tab=summary&timestamp=4358.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate an investment program for Luis's portfolio diversification.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Build a low-risk, long-term investment portfolio to diversify income from a volatile AI business.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Need:** A structured method and expert mentorship to overcome a lack of practical investment experience and avoid information overload from generic courses.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A 6-month program with a personalized plan, 1-on-1 feedback on trades via Discord, and live analysis from a 17-analyst team.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**Decision:** Luis will commit $6k–$10k and decide on a hybrid approach (learning + delegation) after returning from a field trip in \~2–4 weeks.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)

## Topics

### Luis's Need for Diversification

  - [**Primary Business:** Developing enterprise-grade AI agents.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Selling complex tech in the Colombian market is slow and unpredictable, creating a need for stable, diversified income.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [**Objective:** Build a low-risk, long-term (10-year) investment portfolio.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Key Gap:** Lacks a consistent workflow and practical method for identifying opportunities, vetting brokers, and making independent decisions.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**Past Experience:** A single $5k–$7k investment yielded a 7–8% annual return, but was fully managed by a partner.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

### Proposed Solution: 6-Month Program

  - [**Personalized Onboarding:** A questionnaire defines risk profile, goals (e.g., 10–15% return), and a custom learning plan.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [**Expert Mentorship (Discord):**](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [1-on-1 feedback on personal trade analyses from Roberto, Roberto Jr., and Marco Álvarez (30+ years experience).](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [Feedback delivered via text or video for maximum clarity.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [**Live Analysis (Weekly):**](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)
      - [Roberto analyzes member-requested assets live, explaining the "why" behind each decision.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)
  - [**Market Intelligence:**](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [A 17-analyst team filters global market news (macro, crypto, bonds) into actionable weekly briefs.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Provide a framework for building independent criteria, not for copy-pasting trades.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Learning Platform:** 160+ hours of content (technical analysis, market structures) structured to support the personalized plan.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)

### Investment Capital & Logistics

  - [**Capital:** Luis has $6,000–$10,000 available for investment.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [**Approach:** Luis prefers a hybrid model: learn the method while delegating some capital for management to generate returns during the learning phase.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [**Availability:** Luis can dedicate 4–6 hours/week to the program.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Luis is unavailable for the next 2–4 weeks for a field project.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Luis:** Reconnect with Closer1 Ruarte after returning from the field project (\~2–4 weeks) to finalize the decision.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [**Closer1 Ruarte:** Follow up with Luis in late April/early May.](https://fathom.video/calls/624108580?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[To evaluate Ignacio's investment needs and present a mentorship program.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Ignacio's self-taught crypto investing led to a \~60% loss on most assets, erasing prior gains and highlighting the need for a structured system.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Solution:** A 6-month mentorship program with direct access to Robert Ruarte and his team for $1,300 (discounted from $1,700).](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**Decision:** Ignacio is highly interested but will defer enrollment until May to focus on a work course, citing a need for full commitment to the program's investment.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Outcome:** A "soft yes" with a commitment to enroll in May via the existing WhatsApp group.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=2518.0)

## Topics

### Investment Performance & Needs

  - [**Background:** 4 years of self-taught investing, primarily crypto, with a small broker-managed portfolio.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**Crypto Performance:**](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Initial Gain:** Doubled capital during the 2021 bull run.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Current State:** Gains were lost due to a lack of a system for taking profits.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Current Losses:** Most assets are down 40–60%; the portfolio is held at near break-even.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Broker Portfolio (Balance):**](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Assets:** Bonds, CDRs (YPF, Vista), and US stocks (MSFT, GOOG, NVDA, SP500).](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Management:** Relies on basic advisor recommendations without a personal strategy.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Learn a validated system for risk management, entry/exit timing, and profit-taking to achieve consistent returns and eventually replace his primary income.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Proposed Mentorship Program

  - [**Structure:** A 6-month program with a personalized plan based on a risk profile questionnaire.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [**Content:** A curated path through 160+ hours of online material, avoiding overwhelm.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [**Mentors:** Direct access to Robert Ruarte (30+ years experience) and his team (Marco Álvarez, Robert Jr.).](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Support & Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [**Discord:** Structured channels for questions, analysis sharing, and direct feedback.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [**Live Classes:** Weekly sessions with Robert Ruarte for Q\&A and asset analysis.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [**Investment Ideas:** Access to opportunities identified by a 17-analyst team.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**Cost:** $1,300 for 6 months (discounted from $1,700).](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**Time Commitment:** 5–7 hours per week.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)

### Enrollment Decision & Rationale

  - [**Decision:** Defer enrollment until May.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A work course requires his full focus, and he wants to give the $1,300 investment the serious time commitment it deserves.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
  - [**Objection Handling:** Hernán argued for starting now to build momentum, but Ignacio remained firm on waiting.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ignacio:** Complete the work course and contact Hernán via WhatsApp in May to enroll.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=2111.0)
  - [**Hernán:** Keep the WhatsApp group open for Ignacio's follow-up.](https://fathom.video/calls/625616904?tab=summary&timestamp=2642.0)

fathom_summary:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore investment advisory services for Juampi Prieto's portfolio.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Juampi Prieto (26, Buenos Aires) wants to shift his \~$30k portfolio from a low-yield peso carry trade to a higher-growth, dollar-denominated strategy.** The goal is to achieve 20–30% annual returns, well above the \~10% S\&P 500 average.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**The primary hurdle is a lack of a defined strategy for market entry/exit and opportunity identification.** This uncertainty has kept 85% of the portfolio in a peso fund earning a declining 28–30% annual rate.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Two paths were offered:** a 6-month, $1,300 self-directed training program or a fully managed service with a 2.5% admin fee and 70/30 performance split.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
  - [**Prieto is interested in the training program** but needs to review the brochure before committing within the next few weeks.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)

## Topics

### Client Profile & Investment Goal

  - [**Client:** Juampi Prieto, 26, Buenos Aires.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**Portfolio:** \~$30,000 USD.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Current Strategy:** 85% in a peso fund (Cocos Capital) earning 28–30% annually; 15% in S\&P 500 & QQQ ETFs.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [**Problem:** The peso carry trade's yield is falling, and Prieto lacks a strategy to deploy capital into higher-growth, dollar-denominated assets.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [**Goal:** Achieve 20–30% annual returns by identifying and capitalizing on specific market opportunities.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### Proposed Solutions

  - [**1. Self-Directed Training Program**](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
      - [**Cost:** $1,300 (one-time fee, discounted from $1,700).](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
      - [**Duration:** 6 months.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
          - [On-demand video courses.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
          - [Live, recorded classes.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
          - [Discord community access for analysis validation and direct feedback from Roberto (the lead advisor).](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [**2. Fully Managed Service**](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
      - [**Cost:** 2.5% annual admin fee + 70/30 performance split.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
      - [**Process:** The firm operates directly within Prieto's broker account.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

### Ruarte's Pitch & Performance Claims

  - [**Rationale:** A team of 17 analysts filters market noise to provide actionable insights.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [**Performance Example (Toronto Trust Fund):**](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [2023: +340%](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [2022: +68%](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Long-Term Projection:** A "por 10" (10x) portfolio growth over 5–6 years, implying 60–80% annual returns.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ruarte:** Sent the training program brochure to Prieto.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [**Prieto:** Review the brochure and make a decision within the next few weeks.](https://fathom.video/calls/625627055?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)
